# Workspace Setup Checklist

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  Project type, language, and framework are defined: standalone TypeScript Node.js app with Express API, minimal web UI, tests, and docs.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  Project scaffold created in current directory with git initialization, npm configuration, TypeScript config, source folders, and docs.

- [x] Customize the Project
  Added requirement analysis workflow endpoints and URL shortener prototype endpoints with redirect and analytics tracking.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  No required extensions were specified for this project.

- [x] Compile the Project
  Dependencies installed. Lint/build/test validation is part of this setup completion.

- [x] Create and Run Task
  Added .vscode/tasks.json with Run assessment prototype task and executed the dev command.

- [x] Launch the Project
  Development server launched successfully at http://localhost:3000.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  README and docs are present with setup, architecture, and testing notes.

## Notes
- Keep this workspace fully separate from proprietary code.
- Use this repository for external submission and personal Git hosting.
